config.prompt: Explain why the sky appears blue during the day in clear, concise language.

capacity_order_note: Default order is descending so later smaller-cache timings receive any OS-page-cache warming; this is conservative when judging larger caches.

runs.selected_text:
The sky appears blue due to a phenomenon called **Rayleigh scattering**.
